---
title: Lesson Template
description: Authoring pattern for edu-math lessons.
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
### Learning Objectives

- State what the learner should be able to do.
- Use verbs that can be checked: compute, identify, explain, graph, solve.
:::

## Motivation

Explain why the concept matters before introducing notation.

## Concept

Use plain language and a small example.

## Definition

Introduce formal notation.

## Visual Model

Use either a Python plot from `src/edumath` or a browser-side widget when the
rendered documentation must stay interactive without a live Python kernel.

## Worked Example

Show every step.

## Common Mistakes

Name the mistake and show how to avoid it.

## Practice

Give short exercises and quizzes.

## Python Connection

Show how the concept maps to reusable code.
